_meta.corpus: DEMO — Relay Field Systems sample data
_meta.note: Entirely fictional company for demo mode. Must never be cited for real questionnaires.

Company.summary: Relay Field Systems, Inc. — B2B SaaS field-service management platform for mid-market construction, utilities, and telecom companies. 86 employees. Hybrid: HQ Austin, TX (20 seats), London UK (8 seats), remainder remote across US/EU.

Compliance.summary: SOC 2 Type II (report 2026-02, covering 2025, one exception on offboarding gap, since remediated). ISO 27001 in progress (cert audit Q4 2026). No HIPAA/PCI/FedRAMP.

Encryption.summary: AES-256 at rest via GCP Cloud KMS (GMEK), rotated every 90 days. TLS 1.2+ public endpoints, mTLS internally via Istio. CMEK/CMK available on enterprise tier.

Access Control.summary: SSO via Google Workspace with MFA enforced. RBAC for all systems. Access reviews quarterly (monthly for prod). Offboarding: automated within 4h (employees), target 24h (contractors).

AppSec.summary: Annual pen tests. Most recent: CyberGuard Security, 2026-01, no critical, 2 of 3 highs remediated. CI pipeline: Snyk (SCA), Semgrep (SAST), TruffleHog (secrets) — blocking on critical/high. Code review required. Remediation SLAs: Critical 24h, High 7d.

Logging.summary: Application logs, GCP audit logs, network flow logs → Google Cloud Logging. Retention: 13 months. Cloud Monitoring alerts for auth anomalies, privilege escalations. No separate SIEM.

Incident Response.summary: Documented IR plan v2.1 with SEV1-SEV4 matrix, PagerDuty on-call. Quarterly tabletops. Customer notification: SEV1 within 24h, SEV2 within 48h. Post-mortems within 14 days.

BC/DR.summary: Daily Cloud SQL snapshots, cross-region to europe-west1. Weekly to us-west1. AES-256 encrypted. RTO 4h, RPO 1h. Last DR test: 2026-04-15 (restored 3h47m). Quarterly restore testing.

HR Security.summary: Background checks via Checkr (USA) and Sterling (UK/EU) — criminal, employment, credit, right-to-work. Annual KnowBe4 security training, monthly phishing simulations. NDAs for all staff and contractors.

Endpoint.summary: Google Endpoint Management MDM. FileVault (macOS)/BitLocker (Windows) enforced. CrowdStrike Falcon EDR fleet-wide.

Vendors.summary: Subprocessors: GCP, Stripe, Twilio, SendGrid, Datadog (no PII), Intercom. DPA available with GDPR SCCs.

Privacy.summary: DPA with GDPR SCCs. No DPO (under 250, Art 30 exemption). CCPA via privacy@relayfield.example. Data: names, emails, phone, billing tokens, field-service records. No PHI/PCI raw data.

Infrastructure & Network.summary: GCP VPC with default-deny firewall. Private GKE clusters. Access via Cloud IAP (identity + device posture). No VPN/bastion. Separate GCP projects for prod/staging/dev with VPC-SC perimeters.

Policies.summary: 10 written policies, annual review cadence. Data Classification Policy gap — scheduled Q3 2026.

gaps.detail: No evidence — cyber liability insurance and indemnification terms are human-only domains not covered in Tier 1 interview.
No Data Classification Policy yet — scheduled Q3 2026.
